title: podophyllum grayi
intro: Podophyllum grayi, also known as Mayapple or American Mayapple, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. The plant contains podophyllotoxin, a lignan compound with anti-inflammatory and cytotoxic properties, which makes it a valuable medicinal plant. Traditionally, Podophyllum grayi has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Podophyllum grayi include teas, tinctures, and ointments, which are often used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases.
